_description: Verified Literature paper shapes per board. Release A (v7.15.70) foundation file. Unused by code until Release B+ — shipping dormant so schema can be audited first. Extract ranges flagged 'verified:false' pending past-paper research (background agent in progress 2026-04-18). NEVER estimate — all confirmed rows reference real past papers.

_shape_enum.lit-extract-single: 1 extract + 1 question (AQA Shakespeare, 19th C; Edexcel; EDUQAS)
_shape_enum.lit-no-extract: 0 extracts + 1 whole-text question (AQA Modern Text, possibly Edexcel IGCSE Modern Drama / Shakespeare)
_shape_enum.poetry-single-named: 1 named anthology poem printed in full + 1 question
_shape_enum.poetry-comparison: Named poem A + student-chosen poem B + 1 comparison question
_shape_enum.poetry-unseen: 1 unseen poem (Q1) or 2 unseen poems (Q2 comparison), printed in full

_schema.marks: integer — total marks for the question (content + SPaG where applicable)
_schema.spag_marks: integer | null — SPaG portion of total marks (AQA Lit papers include AO4 SPaG)
_schema.aos: array of AO codes (e.g. AO1, AO2, AO3, AO4)

extract.count: integer — number of extracts/poems printed (1 or 2)
extract.lines_min: integer | null — per-extract minimum content lines
extract.lines_max: integer | null — per-extract maximum content lines
extract.verified: boolean — true only when measured from real past papers
extract.source: string — citation for the range

_schema.question_prefix: string | null — canonical opening phrase (for preamble guidance + parser hint)

extract.source: AQA 87021 Jun23/Jun22/Specimen QPs — estimate, needs spot-check against 3 papers

Edexcel 1ET0/02 Section B Part 2 — two unseen poems printed for comparison
